## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the applicable options -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking Change (fix or feature that changes existing functionality)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation (documentation changes only)
- [ ] 🎨 Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance Improvement
- [ ] ✅ Tests (adding or correcting tests)
- [ ] 🔧 Build/CI (changes to build system or CI)
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility (accessibility improvements)

## Checklist
<!-- Ensure all items are completed -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have not added any compiler or linter warnings
- [ ] `./gradlew spotlessCheck` runs without errors

### Tests
- [ ] I have added or updated appropriate tests
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] New and existing instrumented tests pass (if relevant)

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added/updated comments in code (if necessary)
- [ ] I have updated README.md (if necessary)

### Build & Compatibility
- [ ] The app builds successfully for all ABIs
- [ ] The app builds successfully for both editions (Full & Light)
- [ ] My changes do not generate new warnings
- [ ] My changes are compatible with minSdk 29
- [ ] I have verified F-Droid build compatibility (reproducible builds)

### Accessibility (if UI changes)
- [ ] All UI elements have meaningful content descriptions
- [ ] Changes have been tested with TalkBack
- [ ] Changes have been tested with high contrast
- [ ] Touch targets are at least 48dp in size

### Privacy & Offline-First
- [ ] My changes work completely offline
- [ ] My changes do not require external services
- [ ] My changes do not require additional permissions
- [ ] If new permissions are needed, I have documented and justified them

### Dependencies (if relevant)
- [ ] New dependencies are documented in `gradle/libs.versions.toml`
- [ ] New dependencies are compatible with Apache 2.0 License
- [ ] I have updated third-party licenses (if necessary)
